supersedes_note: Op 49 handoff is still authoritative for M-series planning + H6 audit gate context. THIS snapshot is additive: it captures the M-NEW-LIVE first scout profile (TrueCoach) actually being executed end-to-end. Treat the Op 49 doc as 'strategic context, partially stale' and this snapshot as 'tactical truth as of now'.

headline_status.current_op: Op 50.5 — M-NEW-LIVE scout substrate: TrueCoach first profile
headline_status.blocked_on: R72 dual-lens re-audit (Opus 4.8 + GPT-5.5) of fixer output
headline_status.next_human_decision: Approve spawning the dual-lens re-audit; or override and merge immediately

what_changed_since_op_49_handoff: M-NEW-LIVE scout substrate moved from proposal to executing code. First scout profile = TrueCoach.
Browser-extension importer v0 (TrueCoach) shipped and side-loaded on operator's machine (self-test mode only — JSON dump to Downloads, no backend hit).
Operator captured 4 batches of live TrueCoach JSON shapes; extractor finalized against the real shapes (not training-data guesses).

Discovered the chef-built parallel NestJS backend was NEVER merged into the real production backend. The real backend is at Fly.io app 'backend-spring-lake-3890' (region SJC), Supabase Postgres us-west-1, NestJS + Prisma + JwtAuthGuard + RLS via app.current_user_id().
Read the real 6717-line / 168-model Prisma schema; drafted full field-by-field MAPPING_TABLE.md for 16 entity types.
Operator personally signed off mapping table with 15 explicit overrides (OPEN_QUESTIONS.md all answered, incl. OQ#11 coach-exercise scoping RESOLVED).
Built NestJS ScoutModule that writes to the REAL TGP Prisma tables — zero parallel staging tables. 21 prod files, 29 spec files, 300 tests post-fix.

Operator caught the agent NOT adversarially auditing every artifact (was self-grading). Instituted mandatory R72 dual-lens P0-P3 audit before any merge — codified retroactively for ALL prior artifacts.
Adversarial audit #1 (ScoutModule): VERDICT BLOCKED — 0 P0 / 5 P1 / 5 P2 / 6 P3.
Adversarial audit #2 (Extension v0, retroactive on already-installed code): VERDICT SAFE-AS-INSTALLED-BUT-FIX-BEFORE-PROD — 2 P0 / 3 P1 / 4 P2 / 3 P3.
Single Opus 4.8 fixer pass closed all 22 defects across both modules. Wrote FIXER_REPORT.md per module with single VERDICT: ALL_FIXED line.

Doc reconciliation pass landed (this turn): BUILD_REPORTs corrected, INSTALL_INSTRUCTIONS staging↔prod section added, OPEN_QUESTIONS.md / MAPPING_TABLE.md / INSTALL_NOTES.md aligned with fixer changes.

immutable_doctrine_in_force.R0_R3_authorship: Every commit shows Bradley Gleave <bradley@bradleytgpcoaching.com> as author AND committer. Zero tokens of: claude, anthropic, opus, sonnet, haiku, gemini, openai, gpt, llm, ai-generated, ai-assisted, copilot, co-authored-by, 'generated by', 'assisted by'.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R_META_1_musk_first_principles: Question every requirement, delete the part if possible, simplify what remains, accelerate cycle time, automate last.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R_META_2_metaphor_plus_hyperscaler: Every operator-facing choice MUST come with (1) hyperscaler research AND (2) simple one-sentence metaphor.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R_META_3_free_tier_default: Operator is broke. Default to free-tier/zero-cost. No paid resolution paths unless approved.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R_META_4_forbidden_models: Forbidden: Sonnet, Gemini, Haiku as fixers/auditors. Required: claude_opus_4_8 AND gpt_5_5 only for fixers + auditors. CODIFIED IN LAW.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R72_dual_lens: All P0-P3 PRs require parallel Opus 4.8 + GPT-5.5 adversarial review before merge.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R74_test_src_ratio: Target ≥2.0. Operator waiver floor 1.74. Anti-padding — 2 named tests default + R86 exception note if more.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R75_zero_banned_casts: ZERO 'as any', 'as unknown as', '@ts-ignore', '@ts-nocheck', '<any>' in prod. '@ts-expect-error' allowed in test doubles only.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R76_loc_cap: ≤400 prod LOC per file. Split if over.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R78_single_verdict: Every PR body + every report ends with a single VERDICT line.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R82_reversible_migration: Migrations additive only, nullable-defaulted, fully reversible, DOWN.md in lockstep.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R107_audit_log: ActivityEvent emission required for every state-changing action.
immutable_doctrine_in_force.R125_RLS_tier_1: Every new table goes through RLS policy review before prod traffic.

real_tgp_backend.deploy_mechanism: Fly release_command runs prisma migrate deploy on every deploy

modules_in_workspace.name: scout_module
modules_in_workspace.purpose: NestJS module ingesting TrueCoach JSON into REAL Prisma tables (no parallel staging).
outstanding_followups: RLS policy for new ClientCondition table — must land in separate reviewed PR before any prod traffic touches the table
UserClaimService.claimImportedAccount is built but NOT wired into the existing invite-acceptance flow
Coach-owned ExerciseCatalogItem deferred to v2 — needs a coach_id column or visibility scope before reversing the HARD-SKIP
modules_in_workspace.test_runner_caveat: No package.json/node_modules in-sandbox; module is destined to land inside growth-project-backend. Static checks (LOC, grep, R74/R75/R76, tsc against synthesized config) pass here; jest will run on merge.

modules_in_workspace.name: extension_v0
modules_in_workspace.purpose: Chrome MV3 extension that scrapes TrueCoach via JWT-bearer API calls; ships JSON to ScoutModule OR self-dumps to Downloads.
modules_in_workspace.side_loaded_safety_note: The installed copy points at https://api.tgp.coach which is NXDOMAIN — exfiltration is impossible until that domain gets registered. Operator must reload the patched build before anyone could register tgp.coach.
outstanding_followups: Operator needs to reload the patched extension before pointing it at any real backend (currently safe because api.tgp.coach is NXDOMAIN)
Staging↔prod switch is manual edit in extension/shared/protocol.ts (documented in INSTALL_INSTRUCTIONS.md). v2 should env-load.
JWT scavenger KNOWN_TRUECOACH_KEYS list was derived from captured samples — if TrueCoach changes their localStorage key the extractor will degrade gracefully (rejection) but needs an extension update
